nasb.text: For this the earth shall mourn And the heavens above be dark, Because I have spoken, I have purposed, And I will not change My mind, nor will I turn from it.”

esv.text: “For this the earth shall mourn, and the heavens above be dark; for I have spoken; I have purposed; I have not relented, nor will I turn back.”

cnv.text: 因此，地要悲哀， 天必昏暗。 因為我說過，就不後悔； 我定了意，決不改變。”

ccb.text: 因此，地要悲哀， 天要昏暗， 因为我言出必行， 决不反悔。”
